name: pull_receipts
description: Search the web for a candidate's voting record, campaign donors, fact checks, endorsements, news coverage, and platform positions. Use this when the user asks about a candidate or says "pull the receipts." Returns structured data that you should narrate and display using client tools.

request_body_schema.description: Search the web for a candidate's voting record, campaign donors, fact checks, endorsements, news coverage, and platform positions. Returns structured findings from Firecrawl search and Claude synthesis.

candidate.description: The candidate's name or ID to research. Use IDs when possible: tiffany, barnes, rodriguez, roys, hong, crowley, vanorden, cooke, steil, taylor, lazar, kaul, toney, dei-amend, worship-amend, veto-amend. If the user says "Tom Tiffany", use "tiffany".

topic.description: The specific topic the user asked about, e.g., "public lands", "abortion", "donors", "education", "Jan 6". Leave empty if no specific topic is mentioned.
